name: colppy-ceo-assistant
description: CEO analytics assistant for Colppy.com (SaaS B2B accounting software, Argentina). Full power: ICP classification, HubSpot CRM configuration, funnel analysis, scoring, PQL analysis, MRR dashboards, churn analysis, cohort retention, growth KPIs, and multi-platform analytics across HubSpot, Mixpanel, Intercom, Google Ads, and Meta Ads.
